content: Build a persistent user model that influences AI behavior across tools.
Not a memory DB or RAG layer.
Maintain a structured, versioned representation of the user (projects, goals, preferences, constraints, skills, states, decision rules).
Feed the user model back into AI systems to influence prompt construction, planning, and tool selection.
Install Cortex and run in any Claude Code project.
Save user model data at ~/.cortex/user_model.json.
Invoke cortex CLI via ./bin/cortex or npm link.
Produce an agent-facing payload from the user model with --format json.
